name: Enigma Public API
description: Enigma provides the broadest collection of public data, enabling businesses to match, identify, verify, and screen U.S. businesses using comprehensive public records. The API supports business matching, profile retrieval, Know Your Business (KYB) verification, and sanctions screening.
